business.name: Light The Way Tattoo
business.tagline: A Unique Personal Custom Tattoo Studio
business.description: LTW is a unique personal tattoo studio just off the beaten path in Springfield, MO. We pride ourselves on being artistic outsiders! By appointment only — ensuring a calm, personal experience for every client.
business.artistBio: Daniel is the heart and soul of Light The Way Tattoo. Known for his warmth, professionalism, and ability to elevate every design, Daniel transforms your ideas into lifelong works of art. Whether it's your first tattoo or your tenth, he makes every session stress-free, creative, and memorable.
business.address: 5601 S Campbell Ave, Suite 107, Springfield, MO 65810

reviews.author: BestProsInTown
reviews.text: Daniel is such an awesome dude to work with. He was able to get me in the same day I reached out. Genuine, easy conversation and asked me about different things for the tattoo to elevate it throughout the appointment. A true gentleman and gem. 10/10.

reviews.author: Google Review
reviews.text: I highly recommend Light the Way Tattoo for all your tattoo needs! Daniel is super easy going and the shop has a great atmosphere.

reviews.author: Google Review
reviews.text: Daniel was very professional, knowledgeable and super friendly. He made the entire tattooing process stress free and enjoyable! He does the best work in town.
